title: Creamy Caramelized Italian Eggplant Cacio E Pepe Paccheri
description: A Tuscan-inspired brunch dish featuring dark, sweet caramelized eggplant, soft brown sugar, and a smoky twist on the classic Cacio E Pepe.
instructions: Cook the Paccheri in a large pot of boiling salted water until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water and then drain the Paccheri.
In a large copper pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the cubed eggplant and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally. This will take about 20-25 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, garlic, salt, and black pepper to the eggplant and stir to combine.
Add the Parmesan and Pecorino Romano cheese to the eggplant mixture and stir until melted and creamy.
Add the cooked Paccheri to the eggplant mixture and toss to combine, adding some reserved pasta water if the mixture seems dry.
Transfer the Paccheri to a serving dish and top with additional Parmesan cheese and chopped parsley. Drizzle with caramelized eggplant syrup.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
